D:\cmake\cmake-4.1.1-windows-x86_64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\ffwinject.dir/objects.a
D:\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\ffwinject.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\ffwinject.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -O3 -DNDEBUG -mwindows -municode -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\ffwinject.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o ffwinject.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libffwinject.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\ffwinject.dir\linkLibs.rsp
